name: catalog
title: Product Catalog
description: Products with prices and lightweight stock tracking — pick a product and the price flows onto the invoice.
author: Ion Shift Labs <hello@ionshiftlabs.com>

actions.name: adjust_stock
actions.description: Record a signed stock movement for a tracked product and update its stock on hand.

product_id.description: The product to adjust (must have track_stock enabled)

quantity.description: Signed quantity: positive to receive, negative to ship

actions.name: add_invoice_line
actions.description: Add a product to an invoice: snapshots the current price, recomputes the invoice totals, and records a sale stock move for tracked products.

invoice_id.description: The invoice to add the line to

product_id.description: The product to bill (must be active)

quantity.description: Units billed; must be a whole number for stock-tracked products

description.description: Line description override (defaults to the product name)

objects.name: products
objects.description: Sellable goods, services, and subscriptions with pricing and optional stock tracking.

fields.name: cost
fields.description: What the unit costs you — for margin reporting.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Inactive products cannot be added to invoices.

fields.name: track_stock
fields.description: Enable stock movements for this product (usually goods only).

fields.name: stock_on_hand
fields.description: Running sum of stock_moves — maintained by the adjust_stock action, do not edit directly. Backorders may push it negative.

fields.name: reorder_point
fields.description: The low-stock report flags tracked products at or below this level.

objects.name: stock_moves
objects.description: Append-only stock ledger; a product's stock_on_hand is the running sum of its moves.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Signed: positive receives stock, negative ships it.

fields.name: reference
fields.description: Free-text pointer to the cause: PO number, invoice number, …

products.name: Widget — Standard
products.description: Entry-level widget. Stock starts at zero — receive inventory with adjust_stock.

products.name: Widget — Legacy
products.description: Discontinued — kept for invoice history; cannot be added to new invoices.

products.name: Cloud Hosting (Monthly)
products.description: Managed hosting, billed monthly per environment.

roles.name: catalog_manager
roles.description: Manage products; record stock moves. The ledger is append-only — no update/delete on stock_moves.

roles.name: catalog_viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to products and the stock ledger.

tasks.name: catalog-low-stock-report
tasks.description: Logs a daily low-stock reminder (disabled by default; upgrade to a real handler that lists stock_on_hand <= reorder_point once task types allow).

config.message: Catalog low-stock report — check products with stock_on_hand at or below their reorder point.
